forms.formDescription: Patient registration form with Epic FHIR write-back
forms.taskVariable: [{"key": "applicationId", "label": "Submission Id", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "applicationStatus", "label": "Submission Status", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "submitterLastName", "label": "Submitter Last Name", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "submitterFirstName", "label": "Submitter First Name", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "submitterEmail", "label": "Submitter Email", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "currentUser", "label": "Current User", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "currentUserRoles", "label": "Current User Roles", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "medicalRecordNumber", "label": "Medical Record Number", "type": "textfield"}, {"key": "firstName", "label": "First Name", "type": "textfield"}, {"key": "patientId", "label": "Patient ID", "type": "textfield"}, {"key": "surrogateKey", "label": "surrogateKey", "type": "hidden"}]

components.label: buttons

components.title: Review
components.label: Review
Submit Action
Current User Roles
components.calculateValue: const localdata = localStorage.getItem('UserDetails') && (JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('UserDetails'))) || []; value = localdata?.groups?.map(group => group.replace(new RegExp('^/+|/+$', 'g'), '')) || [];

components.label: surrogateKey
components.calculateValue: value || (function() {  var s = [];  var hex = '0123456789abcdef';  for (var i = 0; i < 36; i++) { s[i] = hex[Math.floor(Math.random() * 16)]; }  s[14] = '4';  s[19] = hex[(s[19] & 0x3) | 0x8];  s[8] = s[13] = s[18] = s[23] = '-';  return s.join('');})()
